description_long: This is a large, ornate candelabrum featuring seven slender candle arms radiating symmetrically from a central, sculpted metal stem. Each arm holds a single tall, white taper candle, and the arms are elegantly curved with small, upward-facing candle holders. The base is wide and rounded, providing stability, and the central stem is bulbous and tapers gracefully toward the top. The entire structure appears to be made of dark, wrought iron or a similar metal, giving it a classic, antique appearance. The candles are unlit, and no wax drips are visible, suggesting a pristine or unused state.
description: A large, ornate metal candelabrum with seven curved arms, each holding a tall white candle, and a sculpted, stable base. The design is classic and elegant, with a dark metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of all seven candle arms and the full, rounded base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and curvature of the arms, with the central stem and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back arms and the elegant taper of the central stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arm arrangement and the smooth, bulbous base.
